If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Operator gallery: Lava the Purgatory From Arknights Terra Wiki < [Lava the Purgatory](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory "Lava the Purgatory") [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery#searchInput) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory "Lava the Purgatory") | [File](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/File "Lava the Purgatory/File") | [Story](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava/Story "Lava/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Overview "Lava the Purgatory/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Dialogue "Lava the Purgatory/Dialogue") | Gallery | [Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Trivia "Lava the Purgatory/Trivia") | ## Contents - [1Skins](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery#Skins) - [2Outfits](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery#Outfits) - [3Sprites](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery#Sprites) - [4Promotional material](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery#Promotional_material) ## Skins\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Skins")\] | Base | | --- | | ![Lava the Purgatory.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Lava_the_Purgatory.png?fc44f7) | An outfit commonly worn by [Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator").
While not as practical as a uniform, it's what they find most comfortable. | | Elite 2 | | --- | | ![Lava the Purgatory Elite 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Lava_the_Purgatory_Elite_2.png?d2dd9e) | An outfit that has been improved after the [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator")'s [Promotion](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Promotion "Promotion").
Custom-made to suit each Operator's experiences and needs, these outfits are designed to provide them maximum flexibility on any battlefield. Furthermore, this is all done without compromising the comfort that they've come to expect. | ## Outfits\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Outfits")\] | Dusk Wisteria | | --- | | ![Lava the Purgatory Skin 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Lava_the_Purgatory_Skin_1.png?2e6ae1) | One of Lava the Purgatory's casual outfits.
_After parting ways with [Kroos](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Kroos "Kroos"), [Lava](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava "Lava") prepared several outfits to make it easy for her to traverse the land, and this is one of them._
0011 New Release/Dusk Wisteria. Handmade in [Lungmen](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lungmen "Lungmen"), tailor-fitted with special consideration to exotic design elements. The outfit has been improved in accordance with the customer's preference to incorporate [Yan](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yan "Yan")'s novel trends.
**How to obtain:**
- [Who is Real Rerun](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Who_is_Real/Rerun "Who is Real/Rerun") ( [Outfit Store](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), 18 [![Originite Prime](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Originite_Prime_icon.png/20px-Originite_Prime_icon.png?83ccc8)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Originite_Prime "Originite Prime"))
- [Fashion Review](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Fashion_Review "Fashion Review") (since [Absolved Will Be the Seekers](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Absolved_Will_Be_the_Seekers "Absolved Will Be the Seekers")) | | Purifying Flame | | --- | | ![Lava the Purgatory Skin 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Lava_the_Purgatory_Skin_2.png?54a756) | One of Lava the Purgatory's casual outfits.
_It's not just the clothes that Lava likes. She's even more intrigued to the righteous warriors in [Yanese](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Yan "Yan") stories who smite evil and restore order. This is presumably the reason why ever since she put on this outfit, she has been hard at work practicing Yanese swordplay._
0011 Tempest Series New Arrivals/Purifying Flame. Yanese-style clothes that show off the wearer's blazing spirit. Ebon garments adorned with flame patterns make one's stalwart righteousness all the more eye-catching.
**How to obtain:** [Sui's Garden of Grotesqueries](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Sui%27s_Garden_of_Grotesqueries "Sui's Garden of Grotesqueries") (reach level 95 in [Visit Memento](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Visit_Memento "Visit Memento")) | ## Sprites\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Sprites")\] - Lava the Purgatory's Base Sprite - Lava the Purgatory's _Dusk Wisteria_ Outfit Sprite ## Promotional material\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery?action=edit§ion=4 "Edit section: Promotional material")\] - [![Lava the Purgatory's operator introduction](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Lava_the_Purgatory_operator_introduction.png/200px-Lava_the_Purgatory_operator_introduction.png?3c3ede)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Lava_the_Purgatory_operator_introduction.png "Lava the Purgatory's operator introduction") Lava the Purgatory's operator introduction Retrieved from " [https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava\_the\_Purgatory/Gallery?oldid=734860](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Lava_the_Purgatory/Gallery?oldid=734860)" Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet [Categories](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Special:Categories "Special:Categories"): - [Lava](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Category:Lava "Category:Lava") - [Operator galleries](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Category:Operator_galleries "Category:Operator galleries") [Report bad advertisement](https://www.wiki.gg/t/bad-ad) [![](https://app.wiki.gg/public/1l6fIAjTWgBKcVl6HwTYn7adVep2NcNcv.png)](https://app.wiki.gg/showcase/go?utm_campaign=stx_summersale_2026&utm_medium=bannerfooter&utm_source=arknights.wiki.gg&location=mobile) Cookies help us deliver our services.
